function.name: search_papers
function.description:
Searches for academic papers on arXiv using a query string and
optional paper IDs.

paper_ids.description:
A list of specific arXiv paper
IDs to search for. (default::obj: `None`)

max_results.description:
The maximum number of search results
to return. (default::obj: `5`)

function.name: download_papers
function.description:
Downloads PDFs of academic papers from arXiv based on the provided
query.

paper_ids.description:
A list of specific arXiv paper
IDs to download. (default::obj: `None`)

max_results.description:
The maximum number of search results
to download. (default::obj: `5`)

output_dir.description:
The directory to save the downloaded
PDFs. Defaults to the current directory.

function.name: information_retrieval
function.description:
Retrieves information from a local vector storage based on the
specified query. This function connects to a local vector storage
system and retrieves relevant information by processing the input
query. It is essential to use this function when the answer to a
question requires external knowledge sources.

query.description: The question or query for which an answer is required.

contents.description:
Local file paths, remote URLs or
string contents.

top_k.description:
The number of top results to return during
retrieve. Must be a positive integer. Defaults to
`DEFAULT_TOP_K_RESULTS`.

similarity_threshold.description:
The similarity threshold
for filtering results. Defaults to
`DEFAULT_SIMILARITY_THRESHOLD`.
